mapper.sql: id, application_id, student_no, expected_return_time, reason, destination, description, attachment_url, apply_time, audit_status, audit_time, audit_person, audit_remark
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.application_id, a.student_no, a.expected_return_time, a.reason, a.destination, a.description, a.attachment_url, a.apply_time, a.audit_status, a.audit_time, a.audit_person, a.audit_remark, s.name, s.college, s.dormitory FROM application a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.student_no = s.student_no WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT a.id, a.application_id, a.student_no, a.expected_return_time, a.reason, a.destination, a.description, a.attachment_url, a.apply_time, a.audit_status, a.audit_time, a.audit_person, a.audit_remark, s.name, s.college, s.dormitory FROM application a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.student_no = s.student_no WHERE a.student_no = #{studentNo} ORDER BY a.apply_time DESC

SELECT a.id, a.application_id, a.student_no, a.expected_return_time, a.reason, a.destination, a.description, a.attachment_url, a.apply_time, a.audit_status, a.audit_time, a.audit_person, a.audit_remark, s.name, s.college, s.dormitory FROM application a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.student_no = s.student_no ORDER BY a.apply_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO application ( application_id, student_no, expected_return_time, reason, destination, description, attachment_url, apply_time, audit_status ) VALUES ( #{applicationId}, #{studentNo}, #{expectedReturnTime}, #{reason}, #{destination}, #{description}, #{attachmentUrl}, #{applyTime}, 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE reason = VALUES(reason), destination = VALUES(destination), description = VALUES(description), attachment_url = VALUES(attachment_url), apply_time = VALUES(apply_time)
mapper.update:
UPDATE application
expected_return_time = #{expectedReturnTime},
reason = #{reason},
destination = #{destination},
description = #{description},
attachment_url = #{attachmentUrl},
audit_status = #{auditStatus}, audit_time = NOW(),
audit_person = #{auditPerson},
audit_remark = #{auditRemark},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.application_id, a.student_no, a.expected_return_time, a.reason, a.destination, a.description, a.attachment_url, a.apply_time, a.audit_status, a.audit_time, a.audit_person, a.audit_remark, s.name, s.college, s.dormitory FROM application a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.student_no = s.student_no WHERE a.audit_status = #{auditStatus} ORDER BY a.apply_time DESC

SELECT a.id, a.application_id, a.student_no, a.expected_return_time, a.reason, a.destination, a.description, a.attachment_url, a.apply_time, a.audit_status, a.audit_time, a.audit_person, a.audit_remark, s.name, s.college, s.dormitory FROM application a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.student_no = s.student_no WHERE a.expected_return_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY a.expected_return_time ASC

SELECT a.id, a.application_id, a.student_no, a.expected_return_time, a.reason, a.destination, a.description, a.attachment_url, a.apply_time, a.audit_status, a.audit_time, a.audit_person, a.audit_remark, s.name, s.college, s.dormitory FROM application a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.student_no = s.student_no WHERE a.application_id = #{applicationId}
